title: Retail Roulette
thesis: Retail stocks exhibit high volatility and frequent swings in investor sentiment, often leading to sharp drawdowns and bounces. Retail is a key discretionary consumer spending proxy.
data_sources: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XRT and SPY through price_only adapter
signal_logic: If XRT closes down more than 2% from its 10-day high
entry_exit: Entry: If XRT closes down more than 2% from its 10-day high Exit: After 5 trading days or once XRT recovers to within 1% of its 10-day high
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Yahoo Finance daily prices for XRT and SPY through price_only adapter via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Retail stocks often experience volatile 2%+ daily moves, especially in the current economic environment.

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily prices for XRT and SPY through price_only adapter

schema.behavior: Retail stocks exhibit high volatility and frequent swings in investor sentiment, often leading to sharp drawdowns and bounces.

market_impact.rationale: Retail is a key discretionary consumer spending proxy.

trade_logic.entry: If XRT closes down more than 2% from its 10-day high
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or once XRT recovers to within 1% of its 10-day high

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Retail stocks often experience volatile 2%+ daily moves, especially in the current economic environment.

title: Heartland Harvest
thesis: Crop progress data can signal shifting sentiment around agricultural commodity prices and farm-related stocks. Agriculture is a key materials/industrials sector input.
data_sources: USDA weekly crop progress reports through html_table adapter
signal_logic: If current week's crop progress is more than 5% ahead of the 5-year average
entry_exit: Entry: If current week's crop progress is more than 5% ahead of the 5-year average Exit: After 2 trading weeks or once crop progress falls back to the 5-year average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USDA weekly crop progress reports through html_table adapter via scrape (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Crop progress reports are a regular weekly release, and deviations from historical norms often occur seasonally.

data.source: USDA weekly crop progress reports through html_table adapter

schema.behavior: Crop progress data can signal shifting sentiment around agricultural commodity prices and farm-related stocks.

market_impact.rationale: Agriculture is a key materials/industrials sector input.

trade_logic.entry: If current week's crop progress is more than 5% ahead of the 5-year average
trade_logic.exit: After 2 trading weeks or once crop progress falls back to the 5-year average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Crop progress reports are a regular weekly release, and deviations from historical norms often occur seasonally.

title: Electricity Enlightenment
thesis: Shifts in national electricity demand can signal changes in underlying economic activity and industrial production. Electricity demand is a key indicator for industrials and utilities.
data_sources: EIA weekly electricity demand data through eia_electricity adapter
signal_logic: If weekly electricity demand increases more than 2% above the prior 4-week average
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly electricity demand increases more than 2% above the prior 4-week average Exit: After 2 trading weeks or once demand falls back to the prior 4-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use EIA weekly electricity demand data through eia_electricity adapter via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Electricity demand exhibits regular seasonal patterns, and deviations from typical ranges often occur.

data.source: EIA weekly electricity demand data through eia_electricity adapter

schema.behavior: Shifts in national electricity demand can signal changes in underlying economic activity and industrial production.

market_impact.rationale: Electricity demand is a key indicator for industrials and utilities.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly electricity demand increases more than 2% above the prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 2 trading weeks or once demand falls back to the prior 4-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Electricity demand exhibits regular seasonal patterns, and deviations from typical ranges often occur.

title: Tremor Tension
thesis: Spikes in earthquake activity can signal increased volatility and risk aversion in financial markets. Earthquakes and natural disasters often drive increased healthcare and disaster relief spending.
data_sources: USGS daily earthquake activity data through earthquake_activity adapter
signal_logic: If the daily number of earthquakes worldwide increases more than 10% above the prior 7-day average
entry_exit: Entry: If the daily number of earthquakes worldwide increases more than 10% above the prior 7-day average Exit: After 3 trading days or once earthquake activity falls back to the prior 7-day average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use USGS daily earthquake activity data through earthquake_activity adapter via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity exhibits regular daily and weekly patterns, and deviations from typical ranges often occur.

data.source: USGS daily earthquake activity data through earthquake_activity adapter

schema.behavior: Spikes in earthquake activity can signal increased volatility and risk aversion in financial markets.

market_impact.rationale: Earthquakes and natural disasters often drive increased healthcare and disaster relief spending.

trade_logic.entry: If the daily number of earthquakes worldwide increases more than 10% above the prior 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 trading days or once earthquake activity falls back to the prior 7-day average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Earthquake activity exhibits regular daily and weekly patterns, and deviations from typical ranges often occur.

title: Ev Euphoria
thesis: Growth in the number of public EV charging stations can signal increasing adoption of electric vehicles and related industries. EV adoption is a key driver for the consumer discretionary sector.
data_sources: OpenChargeMap daily EV charging station counts through openchargemap adapter
signal_logic: If the daily count of EV charging stations increases more than 1% from the prior 30-day average
entry_exit: Entry: If the daily count of EV charging stations increases more than 1% from the prior 30-day average Exit: After 5 trading days or once the count falls back to the prior 30-day average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use OpenChargeMap daily EV charging station counts through openchargemap adapter via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charging station growth often exhibits regular weekly and monthly patterns, with deviations from typical ranges.

data.source: OpenChargeMap daily EV charging station counts through openchargemap adapter

schema.behavior: Growth in the number of public EV charging stations can signal increasing adoption of electric vehicles and related industries.

market_impact.rationale: EV adoption is a key driver for the consumer discretionary sector.

trade_logic.entry: If the daily count of EV charging stations increases more than 1% from the prior 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 5 trading days or once the count falls back to the prior 30-day average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: EV charging station growth often exhibits regular weekly and monthly patterns, with deviations from typical ranges.

title: Google Gusts
thesis: Fluctuations in Google search trends can signal shifting consumer and investor interest in various industries. Search trends are a key indicator of digital/tech sector performance.
data_sources: Google Trends weekly search interest for key industry terms through google_trends adapter
signal_logic: If the weekly Google Trends index for a major industry term increases more than 10% from the prior 4-week average
entry_exit: Entry: If the weekly Google Trends index for a major industry term increases more than 10% from the prior 4-week average Exit: After 2 trading weeks or once the index falls back to the prior 4-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest for key industry terms through google_trends adapter via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Google Trends data exhibits regular weekly patterns, and deviations from typical ranges often occur.

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for key industry terms through google_trends adapter

schema.behavior: Fluctuations in Google search trends can signal shifting consumer and investor interest in various industries.

trade_logic.entry: If the weekly Google Trends index for a major industry term increases more than 10% from the prior 4-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 2 trading weeks or once the index falls back to the prior 4-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Google Trends data exhibits regular weekly patterns, and deviations from typical ranges often occur.

title: Weather Windfall
thesis: Deviations from normal weather patterns can impact various industries and sectors. Weather can drive energy consumption and production levels.
data_sources: Open-Meteo daily temperature, precipitation, and wind speed data through weather_series adapter
signal_logic: If the daily average temperature, precipitation, or wind speed deviates more than 2 standard deviations from the prior 30-day average
entry_exit: Entry: If the daily average temperature, precipitation, or wind speed deviates more than 2 standard deviations from the prior 30-day average Exit: After 3 trading days or once the weather metric returns to within 1 standard deviation of the prior 30-day average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Open-Meteo daily temperature, precipitation, and wind speed data through weather_series adapter via api (daily).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weather data exhibits regular daily and weekly patterns, and deviations from typical ranges often occur.

data.source: Open-Meteo daily temperature, precipitation, and wind speed data through weather_series adapter

schema.behavior: Deviations from normal weather patterns can impact various industries and sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Weather can drive energy consumption and production levels.

trade_logic.entry: If the daily average temperature, precipitation, or wind speed deviates more than 2 standard deviations from the prior 30-day average
trade_logic.exit: After 3 trading days or once the weather metric returns to within 1 standard deviation of the prior 30-day average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weather data exhibits regular daily and weekly patterns, and deviations from typical ranges often occur.

title: Rss Roar

implementation_notes: Use RSS feed counts for key industry news terms through rss_count adapter via api (daily).
